title: scabiosa atropurpurea subsp. cupanii
intro: Scabiosa atropurpurea subsp. cupanii, also known as the 'Dark Blue Pincushion Flower', is a perennial plant species belonging to the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and as an antispasmodic agent. The health benefits of Scabiosa atropurpurea subsp. cupanii include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and act as an antacids. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health conditions.
